name: higher-order
description: Reusable skills that help agents clarify prompts, show useful working state, and connect product taste with implementation structure.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for prompt probing, visible agent work, UI design, and project architecture.
interface.longDescription: Higher Order packages reusable Codex skills for better agent work: probing vague prompts, making assumptions and rationale visible, defining success, narrowing decisions, writing implementation-ready guidance, and connecting UI design taste with project architecture taste so users can steer before the model builds the wrong thing.
defaultPrompt: Probe this app idea before implementing. Ask only the questions that would change the build.
Restate what you think I want, name your assumptions, then propose the smallest useful first version.
Before coding, define what production-ready means for this project and what you are intentionally not building.
